name: Buckeyes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the margarine, peanut butter, and powdered sugar in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. Place the balls on a wax paper-covered cookie sheet.
4. Let the balls set for some time or chill them in the refrigerator to firm up.
5. Melt the dipping chocolate (available at Sugarcraft) over the top of a double boiler or in the microwave on low power (50%).
6. Do not heat the chocolate above 120 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Dip each ball into the melted chocolate, leaving the top part uncoated.
8. Using a table fork, lift the coated candy and allow excess chocolate to drip off.
9. Place the dipped candy onto the wax paper-covered cookie sheet using a toothpick to keep it in place.
10. Store the cookies tightly covered in a cool, dry place. They will last for 3-6 weeks.
